aruism5_to_afe_operator_map.note: The 5 Aruism viewpoints map near-1:1 onto the AFE ADMITTED operators (already compiled + sealed + scored). This is the central ALREADY-OWNED finding.
aruism5_to_afe_operator_map.存在の連動性 (coupling): OP-INTERDEPENDENCE-001 (+ FE-LINK E×E, FE-TERNARY, scheduler LENS 'inversion/temporal')
aruism5_to_afe_operator_map.存在の対称性 (symmetry / structural inversion): OP-SYMMETRY-001 (+ afe B-arm skeptic, scheduler LENS 'inversion', P_SKEPTIC)
aruism5_to_afe_operator_map.存在の対等性 (parity / common representation): OP-EQUALITY-001 (+ aggregate.norm() equivalence grouping, mask_v2, signature_call)

incident_catalogue.taka_move: design overtakes implementation; drive by operational evidence

incident_catalogue.incident: verify id-from-log using tests that write the log (circular)
incident_catalogue.taka_move: test isolation must precede SoR changes

incident_catalogue.incident: ABSENCE->SPECIFIED; mode derived from claim polarity
incident_catalogue.taka_move: adopt orthogonalization: epistemic-kind orthogonal to polarity; ABSENCE!=SPECIFIED withdrawn

incident_catalogue.incident: planned source-kind mints COMPLETED official leg on fetch
incident_catalogue.taka_move: planned!=acquired!=observed!=searched; look at the primitive that happened, not upstream summary

incident_catalogue.incident: validator fired on real ESDE inline-corrections
incident_catalogue.taka_move: not a format bug: which is right, the validator's premise or the world?
split one metric into M1 grounding / M2 placement / M3 format (orthogonal axes)

incident_catalogue.incident: Claude recommended its own preference for GPU co-serve
incident_catalogue.taka_move: route the decision through the system; seal Claude preference; 'impossible' was declared-not-measured

incident_catalogue.incident: cluster instability read as intrinsic to meta-frames
incident_catalogue.taka_move: mini-C: it is a procedural error (batch hard single-cluster), not intrinsic; use incremental multi-membership
scorer-granularity fix: whole-condition scoring hid axis-level difference
incident_catalogue.aux_label: axis (score the latent axis) + none(instrument repair)

incident_catalogue.taka_move: redefine success = FORCED_OUT_OF_SCOPE intervention frequency -> 0 (free the Aruism-owner)

incident_catalogue.aux_label: symmetry (opposite scorer -> opposite result) + none(instrument repair)

incident_catalogue.taka_move: hard-core BEFORE scheduler (overfit guard, origin-laundering isomorphism)
incident_catalogue.surviving: hard-core {08,10,30} fixed; single-axis verdict reversed under 2-axis

incident_catalogue.incident: audit rounds 2-5 same defect DOF hops routing->selection->generation->criterion
incident_catalogue.taka_move: terminator: downgrade to capability-exhibit; generalization -> FUTURE-SEALED (drop the claim, not patch the knob)
incident_catalogue.surviving: capability-exhibit vs FUTURE-SEALED split; escalate-not-patch honored

incident_catalogue.incident: serial generation, GPU 96% read as throughput
incident_catalogue.taka_move: changed observation frame validity->throughput; asked effective batch size
incident_catalogue.aux_label: axis (introduce missing observation axis) + none(missing live channel)

incident_catalogue.taka_move: audit whether R4 is a valid instrument (it was never even run; default-fill)

ownership_checklist.inversion_counter_hypothesis: OWNED(exhibit) afe B-arm / scheduler inversion lens / P_SKEPTIC
ownership_checklist.compare_to_rebuild: OWNED(exhibit) scheduler compare_call->rebuild_call (TRANSFORMED from multi-view; branch CLOSED NEGATIVE at bar)
ownership_checklist.scheduler_routing: OWNED(process) process_aggregate+run_process_optimizer trigger-gated; OWNED(exhibit) scheduler rs_run convergence
ownership_checklist.multi_view: OWNED(exhibit) scheduler sample_lenses/view_call; afe D-arm; MULTI_SCORER_CONSENSUS
ownership_checklist.failure_weighted_search: ABSENT (originloo ranks by token-overlap, not failure weight)
ownership_checklist.attention_mobility: OWNED(exhibit) scheduler sample_lenses varies by seed AND attempt; HOLD->SHIFT-AGAIN
ownership_checklist.return_downscale: OWNED(exhibit) run_recon_exhibit.lossy L1/L2/L3 ladder; scheduler substrate lens
ownership_checklist.objective_anchor: OWNED(exhibit) FE-CREATIVITY-ORTHOGONAL, rebuild T0-anchor, orchestrate decision_relevance
ownership_checklist.residual_regime_detection: PARTIAL: residual=FE-EPSILON-RESIDUAL (PROVISIONAL/NARROW); regime=process_aggregate model_switch_overhead_ratio DOMINANT_OVERHEAD trigger; no general regime/residual detector

transformations.T1_multiview_to_compare_rebuild: CONFIRMED (flag: scheduler branch CLOSED NEGATIVE at bar; compare->rebuild survived only as strongest directional/necessary-looking component)
transformations.T2_axis_injection_to_detection_reconstru: CONFIRMED as pivot / PARTIAL as mechanism (axis-operators as capability downgraded; what survived = 2-axis measurement + precision-recall complementarity)
transformations.T3_generalization_to_capability_exhibit_: CONFIRMED (6-round downgrade; DOF cannot hop into a claim that no longer exists)
transformations.T4_failure_lessons_to_instrument_self_re: CONFIRMED (measurement discipline lineage, NOT a data detector)
transformations.H3_failure_lesson_to_regime_residual_det: DENIED (no regime detector; no residual detector; 'regime'/'residual' are domain data or bookkeeping fields)

B_transformed: axis-injection capability -> DETECTION/RECONSTRUCTION split + precision-recall complementarity
C_unowned_candidate: meta-instrument doubt (when an instrument/metric fires, question the instrument's premise vs the world) DE-0048/0113/0126

live cross-cutting PROCESS_OBSERVATION / expectation-residual channel DE-0126 (proposal only)
